inputs.label: Percentile
inputs.businessContext: Cumulative probability from a normal distribution (0–100).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cumulative probability from a normal distribution (0–100).
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad acumulada de una distribución normal (0–100).

inputs.label: Mean
inputs.businessContext: Mean of the underlying distribution (0 for standard Z).

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean of the underlying distribution (0 for standard Z).
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittelwert der zugrunde liegenden Verteilung (0 für Standard-Z).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne de la distribution sous-jacente (0 pour Z standard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Media de la distribución subyacente (0 para Z estándar).

inputs.label: Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of the underlying distribution (1 for standard Z).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of the underlying distribution (1 for standard Z).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel dağılımın standart sapması (standart Z için 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardabweichung der zugrunde liegenden Verteilung (1 für Standard-Z).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type de la distribution sous-jacente (1 pour Z standard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar de la distribución subyacente (1 para Z estándar).
